scenarios.injection: Corrupt checksum/malformed counters in a copy of a sanitized capture.
scenarios.recovery: Replay the unmodified capture and confirm transport counters return to baseline.

scenarios.injection: Use a bounded Profiler threshold scenario and retain the actual FIFO and Trace payloads.
scenarios.recovery: Restore Profiler control, period and threshold; require every recovery read to equal baseline.

scenarios.injection: Compare equal 10-second windows at DEMO_PERIOD 1,000,000 and 100,000,000 ticks.
scenarios.recovery: Restore DEMO_PERIOD and Profiler control/period; require every recovery read to equal baseline.

scenarios.injection: Arm with a safe trigger expression known not to occur during the window.
scenarios.recovery: Stop/clear the analyzer and require all nine restored LA registers to equal baseline.

scenarios.injection: Remove one chunk from a copy of a sanitized board capture.
scenarios.recovery: Use the unmodified capture and confirm chunk/sample counts and integrity hash.
